overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars Jedi game showing a character exploring ancient cave ruins. The character emerges from a dark cavern into misty outdoor environments, encounters scout troopers, traverses platforming sections, and uses force abilities to navigate the terrain.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the cave into misty ancient ruins, the character encounters two scout troopers standing guard near a stream and runs past them through the mossy rock formations.

segments.scene_description: The character navigates the ruin environment by jumping across gaps in the terrain, sliding down a grassy slope, and approaching a stone archway with a waterfall visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: After the force interaction, the character explores a new section of misty ancient ruins, walking along a stone path toward a large distant temple structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic darkness of a cave into a vast, misty landscape of ancient ruins. It begins within a narrow cavern of rough stone and hanging vines, moving steadily toward a bright portal of light at the exit. As the character emerges into the open air, the scene shifts to a mossy environment where they sprint past scout troopers guarding a stream before navigating gaps in the terrain and sliding down a grassy slope toward a distant waterfall. The camera then follows the character onto a wooden platform overlooking a misty chasm of floating islands, where a force ability activates a glowing blue mark on a stone wall. Finally, the perspective opens up as the character leaves the chasm behind, walking along a stone path toward a massive temple structure looming in the distance.
